title: tanacetum scopulorum
intro: Tanacetum scopulorum, also known as mountain tansy, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of mountain tansy include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as reduction of fever and relief from headaches. Mountain tansy is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations for its medicinal effects.
